'''Archae Teuthis''' was the [[Sulituan]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. It was covered in deep [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] and the Sulituans lived in large float-[[City/Legends|cities]] built of [[phrnnoc]], a type of [[Coral/Legends|coral]].

{{Planet-stub}}
